name: Kekkomon
description: A Lesser Digimon with a richly colored body surface. Its tongue, which constantly protrudes from its mouth, is a remarkable tactile organ, and by licking objects it has an interest in, it is able to obtain detailed information such as their shape, texture, taste, and compositional matter. Its eyesight is poor, possibly due to its developed tongue. Since it can move around quickly despite its short limbs, it is difficult to capture. When attacked by other Digimon, it intimidates the opponent with its " Beat Lick ", a strike using its tongue, and then flees in the blink of an eye.
